title: dondia depressa
intro: Dondia depressa, also known as the "Bitter Apple," is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its bitter and astringent properties, which are believed to have various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Dondia depressa include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Dondia depressa is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
